name: Wholemeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour and salt, then rub in the lard.
2. Dissolve the yeast in half the water and add the sugar.
3. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture.
4. Add the yeast mixture and enough tepid water to form a soft, elastic dough.
5. Knead thoroughly on a floured board until the dough is smooth.
6. Place the dough in a warm area and let it rise until doubled in size.
7. Re-knead and divide into two portions.
8. Shape each portion into loaves and place them in greased and floured tins.
9. Cover with a clean cloth and allow to rise for 20 minutes.
10. Brush the tops of the loaves with water and sprinkle with wholemeal flour.
11. Bake in a very hot oven (450°F or Mark 8) for 45-50 minutes.
